description.value: **Benefit:** You gain a bonus on saving throws against breath weapons and fear effects equal to half your favored enemy ( dragon ) bonus. Whenever you succeed at a Reflex saving throw against a dragonâs extraordinary or supernatural ability that would deal half damage, you instead take no damage. If you already have the evasion class feature, you instead gain an inquisitorâs stalwart ability against dragons â extraordinary and supernatural abilities.
